strengths: 20 years of engineering experience across full-stack, cloud, and infrastructure—exceeds 15-year minimum significantly with documented progression to Staff level
Demonstrated cloud and infrastructure expertise: AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, directly addressing the role's strategic AI focus
concerns: AI expertise is too nascent: only 2 months into AI-focused work with no prior demonstrated ML/AI products, platforms, or deep technical depth in machine learning
Missing preferred advanced credentials: BS Computer Science and BS in Photography/Video—no Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field

Limited strategic advisory and customer partnership evidence: resume demonstrates strong hands-on engineering leadership but sparse examples of advising strategic customers/partners on technology adoption or shaping product direction at scale

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and demonstrated AI products
Strategic customer advisory and vision leadership

response.justification: Bogdan meets the hard requirements: 20 years exceeds the 15-year minimum, and he holds a BS in Computer Science. His current role at re:cinq involving AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks is strategically relevant. However, the fit for director-level AI strategy is weak due to three significant gaps: AI expertise is only 2 months old with no prior ML/AI product work or recognized domain depth (a core preferred qualification); he lacks the preferred Master's/PhD in AI; and the resume shows limited evidence of strategic customer advising or product-vision leadership at scale—essential for a director-level role. His entrepreneurial background (GISCollective founder) and knowledge-sharing through talks provide modest positives but don't offset the core strategic advisory gap.
